# Bonyad — extended summary for LLMs

This is the long-form companion to `llms.txt`. It contains a more complete
overview of how the platform works, intended for AI assistants that want
to ground responses in canonical product copy rather than scrape pages.

> Maintenance: Regenerate this file from the live content whenever the
> homepage, help center, or FAQ surface changes substantively.

## What Bonyad is

Bonyad is a marketplace platform serving the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
Customers describe their construction or home-service need — anything from
plumbing and electrical work to large renovation projects. **Verified**
technicians (identity confirmed via NAFATH or ABSHER, business credentials
confirmed via Wathq) bid on the project. The customer chooses a bid, the
work is broken into phases with defined deliverables and prices, and
payment is held in escrow and released phase by phase. Both parties sign
a digital contract before work begins.

## Why "verified"

Every technician on Bonyad has been identity-verified through Saudi
government services (NAFATH for individuals, Wathq for businesses). The
verification status is shown on every technician's profile.

## How a project works

1. The customer posts a project describing the work needed, region, and
   approximate budget.
2. Technicians who match the service category and region submit bids.
3. The customer reviews technician profiles (portfolio, ratings, reviews,
   verified status) and accepts a bid.
4. A digital contract is signed by both parties.
5. The work is broken into phases. Each phase has a deliverable and price.
6. The customer pays each phase into escrow before the technician starts.
7. When the technician finishes a phase, the customer confirms completion
   and the escrowed payment is released.
8. After project completion, the customer leaves a review.

## Services covered

Service categories include — but are not limited to — plumbing, electrical
work, painting, carpentry, tiling, HVAC, general contracting, interior
finishing, roofing, and home appliance repair. The full live list lives at
/services on the site.

## Languages and region

Bonyad is fully bilingual (English + Arabic). The active language is stored
in a `bonyad-lang` cookie; the same URL serves both. Arabic activates a
full RTL layout. The platform is available only in Saudi Arabia.

## Pricing and fees

Customers do not pay a platform fee directly — Bonyad charges technicians
a commission on completed work. Pricing per project is negotiated between
the customer and the technician.

## Where to learn more

- Help center: /help — step-by-step articles
- FAQ: /faq — quick answers to common questions
- Blog: /blog — articles and guides
- Contact: /contact — customer support

## Update policy

Refresh this file whenever the live help center, FAQ, or homepage copy
changes meaningfully.
